title: From Pokémon GO to physical AI: Niantic Spatial unveils its global 3D mapping platform
summary: Niantic Spatial, the company spun out of Pokémon GO maker Niantic, is launching a revamped version of its Scaniverse platform and a new global visual positioning system, in its biggest release since becoming an independent company last year. Read More
author: Todd Bishop

title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
author: Adam Zewe | MIT News

title: This new chip survives 1300°F (700°C) and could change AI forever
summary: A team of engineers has created a breakthrough memory device that keeps working at temperatures hotter than molten lava, shattering one of electronics’ biggest limits. Built from an unusual stack of ultra-durable materials, the tiny component can store data and perform calculations even at 700°C (1300°F), far beyond what today’s chips can handle. The discovery was partly accidental, but it revealed a powerful new mechanism that prevents heat-induced failure at the atomic level.
